title: object-fit
description: Controls how an img or video fills its container. object-fit: cover scales the image to fill the box completely, cropping the overflow while preserving the original aspect ratio.
challenge: The images are stretched and squashed to fit the square boxes. Make them fill their containers while keeping their natural proportions — some cropping is expected.

alternatives.name: object-fit: contain
alternatives.description: contain scales the image to fit entirely inside the box — no cropping. The full image is always visible but may leave empty space (letterboxing). Use for logos, diagrams, or any image where cropping would hide important content.

realWorldUsage: Standard for product image grids, team photo cards, and article thumbnails — any time images come from a CMS or user uploads with inconsistent dimensions. object-fit: cover keeps the grid visually consistent without requiring images to be pre-cropped to a specific ratio.
